title: Presentation Kit Slide
description: Per-slide spec. Produced by /plan-deck, consumed by /build, mutated by /revise-deck, /image, /motion, /notes.

actionTitle.description: Full-sentence takeaway. Not a topic label. Enforced by action-title-lint.

beat.description: Arc beat this slide fulfills. Must exist in arc.json#/beats[].id

content.description: Template-specific slot values. Shape depends on template.slots.

tokens.description: Token references for this slide's visual properties. Keys are slide-scoped roles (bg, fg, typeScale, accent), values are token paths.

notes.description: Speaker notes. Applied via figma_execute → slide.speakerNotes.

motion.description: Intra-slide motion specs. Choreographed via duplicate-slide + smart-animate.

sources.description: Claim citations. Format: 'research.json#claim-NN'. Every body claim must have at least one source.

nodeId.description: Figma Slides node ID. Populated by /build; session-scoped. Null before build, stale across sessions.

skipped.description: If true, slide exists but is skipped in presenter mode (figma_skip_slide)
